diary.title: Diary
diary.subtitle: Your personal space for thoughts and memories
diary.noEntriesDescription: Start writing your thoughts for today

descriptions.1: Major life events like getting married, new job, buying a house
descriptions.2: Important personal developments and meaningful experiences
descriptions.3: Notable daily events and moderate achievements
descriptions.5: Casual thoughts and trivial daily anecdotes

friends.title: Friends
friends.subtitle: Manage friend profiles to filter and organize your diary entries
friends.createFirstFriend: Create your first friend profile above!
friends.name: Friend Name
friends.tagsDescription: Select tags to filter entries for this friend

relevanceDurations.title: Relevance Duration Settings
relevanceDurations.description: Set how many days entries with different relevance levels remain visible
relevanceDurations.explanation: Entries are automatically hidden after their relevance duration expires. For example, if you set life-changing relevance to 30 days, those entries will only be visible for 30 days after creation.

tags.title: Tag Management
tags.subtitle: Create and manage tags for organizing your diary entries
tags.noTagsDescription: Create your first tag to start organizing your diary entries.
tags.name: Tag Name

404.title: Page Not Found
404.desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

500.title: Server Error
500.desc: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.
